title: Flame model Pregnane X receptor activation
content:
# Flame model Pregnane X receptor activation

Authors: Pastor, Manuel
Published: 2023-02-01T15:03:38Z
Subjects: Chemistry, Computer and Information Science, Medicine, Health and Life Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/IALHR8

Dataset containing a Flame QSAR model for predicting Pregnane X receptor activation. The model is described in the metadata.txt file. The PXR_FAIR.tgz file can be imported into any instance of the open-source Flame (https://github.com/phi-grib/flame) and be used for predicting the properties of chemical substances from their 2D structure.

Citation: Pastor, Manuel, 2023, "Flame model Pregnane X receptor activation", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/IALHR8, Harvard Dataverse, V1
